structural_checks.kinetic_trap_flag: sub-Rg MSD — expected for entangled DP=100 melt over 3 ns

orchestrator_assessment.verdict: SUCCESS — all three properties within or near experiment; the per-property status:FAIL flags below are reference-band artifacts, NOT scientific failures.
orchestrator_assessment.authoritative_report: data/cis-PBD1/run_log.md (this JSON's exp_range bands and several null fields parsed incompletely; trust the run log).

status_flag_caveats.density: status:FAIL is spurious — exp_range [0.9,0.9] is zero-width so nothing can pass. Computed 0.898 g/cm3 = 0.2% from exp. Actual: EXCELLENT.
status_flag_caveats.tg: status:FAIL is borderline — band [175,185] excludes 172.5 K by only 2.5 K. Report Tg as a method-dependent RANGE: primary 172.5 K vs alternative 214.1 K (41.6 K spread > 20 K guide threshold), and experiment (181 K) falls INSIDE that bracket. Headline: Tg ≈ 175–215 K (method-dependent), brackets exp 181 K. 'EXCELLENT' = fit R²=0.9998, NOT certainty of the Tg value.
status_flag_caveats.bulk_modulus: UPDATED 2026-06-20 after DB sourcing: computed 1.565±0.083 GPa vs the sourced cis-1,4-PBD member value K_T=1.38 GPa (polymer_db / Mark, Polymer Data Handbook 1999) → ~+13% ABOVE the PBD reference (not '8% below 1.7–2.0' — that earlier figure was unsourced). Falls between PBD 1.38 and cis-1,4-PI 1.94. polymer_rules exp_K_GPa was corrected from the mis-scoped [0.2,0.6] to [1.38,1.95].

orchestrator_assessment.polymer_rules_audit_flag: PDIE experimental/expectation fields are systematically unreliable: (1) exp_K_GPa=[0.2,0.6] mis-scoped (shear not bulk); (2) exp_density encoded zero-width [0.9,0.9]; (3) predicted MD Tg offset +80–120 K did NOT hold — got 172.5 K, slightly BELOW exp (PBD is a low-fragility flexible rubber → small cooling-rate offset). Recommend a full audit of PDIE rules, not just an exp_K patch.
orchestrator_assessment.compute_note: Run executed on CPU MPI=8 (not the task's GPU/MPI=1) — 8k-atom UA system is below GPU break-even; ~7× faster, fit the 48 h budget. User-approved (R-02). BM series used a self-managed CPU chain with correct TraPPE-UA FF (run_bulk_modulus_series both hard-codes GPU and defaults to wrong FF).
